summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Dashboard (صفحة المدير) for Trend Syria app. All 26 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing completed for all major sections including header icons, users management, delivery settings, stores/products, offers/marketing, settings/system, and reports/analytics.

ui_bugs.issue: Login button click does not trigger form submission - only Enter key works (known issue from previous iteration)

issues: Chart width/height warning in console - 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - charts still render correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard comprehensive testing completed. All sections working correctly: Header icons (Map, Call Requests, Emergency, Notifications, Problem Solver), Users (Customers, Sellers, Drivers), Support, Delivery Settings (Performance, Settings, Boxes, Violations, Challenges, Recorded Calls), Stores/Products (Products, Orders, Commissions, Restaurants, Featured Stores, Inventory, Price Reports, Reports), Offers/Marketing (Daily Deals, Flash Sales, Coupons, Banners, Ads, Offers Bar, Product Badges), Settings/System (Platform, Main Sections, Categories, Images, Admins, Categories), Reports/Analytics (Analytics, Activity Log). Toggle switches in Platform Settings are visible and functional. Number field editing works correctly. Scroll to top functionality works.

admin_login.details: Admin can login with phone 0911111111 and password Admin@123 using Enter key

header_icons.details: All 5 header icons working: Map (خريطة), Call Requests (طلبات الاتصال), Emergency (طوارئ), Notifications (الإشعارات), Problem Solver (حل المشاكل)

users_section.details: Users management sections accessible: Customers (عملاء), Sellers (بائعين), Drivers (سائقين)

delivery_settings.details: Delivery settings sections accessible: Performance (الأداء), Settings (الإعدادات)

stores_products.details: Stores and products sections accessible: Products (المنتجات), Orders (الطلبات), Commissions (العمولات), Restaurants (المطاعم)

offers_marketing.details: Offers and marketing sections accessible: Daily Deals (صفقات اليوم), Flash Sales (عروض فلاش), Coupons (الكوبونات), Banners (البانرات)

settings_system.details: Settings and system sections accessible: Platform (المنصة), Main Sections (أقسام الرئيسية), Categories (الأقسام), Images (الصور), Admins (المدراء)

reports_analytics.details: Reports and analytics sections accessible: Analytics (التحليلات) with charts and stats, Activity Log (سجل النشاط)

platform_toggles.details: All platform toggle switches visible and functional: Food, Shop, Delivery, Wallet, Referral, Daily Deals, Flash Sales, WhatsApp

number_fields.details: Number input fields can be edited and cleared correctly

scroll_to_top.details: Pages open at top position (scroll position = 0)

backend_apis.details: All 26 admin API endpoints tested and working: stats, users, sellers, delivery, products, orders, settings, notifications, commissions, sub-admins, call requests, emergency, food stores, delivery settings, driver reports, low stock, flash sales, food offers
